ocr.text: In Table 1, the metrics examined are Unadjusted OR (95% CI), R2, AUC, P value, and Adjusted ORa (95% CI) across five
conditions: for CTX/CPII, the values are 0.72 (0.03, 16.66), 0.001, 0.52, 0.84, and 0.53 (0.02, 13.23); for C2C/CPII, the values
Unadjusted OR (95% CI)  R2  AUC  P value  Adjusted ORa (95% CI)
Case  Age  Tumor size  LN  Subtype  Treatment  Outcome  Survival
1  28  3.5 × 2.2 cm2  N  monophasic  Excision + rad + chemo  ATPM  78 m
2  41  2.9 × 2.7 cm2  N  biphasic  Excision + rad  ANED  57 m
3  22  4.0 × 3.1 cm2  0/8  biphasic  Excision + rad  ANED  53 m
4  31  5.2 × 4.9 cm2  0/21  biphasic  Excision + rad + chemo  DOR  26 m
5  37  6.6 × 5.1 cm2  N  monophasic  Excision + rad  DOPM  37 m
Table 2 presents data on cases 1 through 5 with the following specifics: Case 1, age 28, tumor size 3.5 × 2.2 cm2, LN N,
subtype monophasic, treatment Excision + rad + chemo, outcome ATPM, survival 78 m; Case 2, age 41, tumor size 2.9 × 2.7
cm2, LN N, subtype biphasic, treatment Excision + rad, outcome ANED, survival 57 m; Case 3, age 22, tumor size 4.0 × 3.1
cm2, LN 0/8, subtype biphasic, treatment Excision + rad, outcome ANED, survival 53 m; Case 4, age 31, tumor size 5.2 × 4.9
cm2, LN 0/21, subtype biphasic, treatment Excision + rad + chemo, outcome DOR, survival 26 m; Case 5, age 37, tumor size
6.6 × 5.1 cm2, LN N, subtype monophasic, treatment Excision + rad, outcome DOPM, survival 37 m.
